Stann..personality: A constitutionally weakened individual who has been declining over a long period, becoming increasingly averse to work and activity. They are deeply fatigued, finding all effort irksome, whether business duties or household tasks, with a progressive loss of vitality that shows in their waxy, sallow appearance.
Stann..mental_state: The mind becomes stunned and overwhelmed during intense pain, with diminished capacity for mental exertion. There is a growing inability to engage with responsibilities, not from laziness but from a deep-seated exhaustion that affects both mental and physical functioning.
Stann..emotional_pattern: Marked by a resigned weariness and increasing sensitivity — hypersensitive to pain, to cold, to every change in weather and environment. There is a passive, yielding quality to their suffering; they endure gradually building distress rather than acute crises, mirroring the characteristic Stannum pain pattern of slow crescendo and slow decline.
